Since each row represents a driver and their associated car, we need to look at the "car" column for both drivers to compare their vehicles. John Briggs drove a "honda prelude chevrolet" (row 1) and James Phillip also drove a "honda prelude chevrolet" (row 3). Therefore, the type of car they both drove was the same.
